'''旧暦9月2日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[霊亀]]元年（[[715年]]_月_日） - 瑞亀献上により霊亀に改元 * [[建仁]]3年（[[1203年]]_月_日） - [[比企氏の乱]]。[[源頼家]]の外戚・[[比企能員]]による[[北条時政]]打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * [[明治]]4年（[[1871年]]_月_日） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]18年（[[1641年]]_月_日） - [[吉良義央|吉良上野介義央]]、江戸幕府高家肝煎（+ [[1702年]]） * [[天保]]12年（[[1841年]][[10月16日]]） - [[伊藤博文]]、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1909年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[開化天皇]]元年（[[紀元前158年]]_月_日） - [[孝元天皇]]、8代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月1日 (旧暦)|9月1日]] 翌日[[9月3日 (旧暦)|9月3日]] - 前月[[8月2日 (旧暦)|8月2日]] 翌月[[10月2日 (旧暦)|10月2日]] *新暦[[9月2日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[霊亀]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[715年]][[10月2日]]） - 瑞亀献上により[[和銅]]から霊亀に[[改元]] * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月7日]]） - [[比企能員の変]]。[[源頼家]]の外戚・[[比企能員]]による[[北条時政]]打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[10月14日]]） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[10月14日]]） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1641年]][[10月5日]]） - [[吉良義央]]、[[江戸幕府]]高家肝煎（+ [[1702年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[9月29日]]） - [[真田幸貫]]、第8代[[松代藩]]主（+ [[1852年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[10月10日]]） - [[松平春嶽]]、[[幕末]]の[[越前藩]]主、[[政事総裁職]]（+ [[1890年]]） * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[10月16日]]） - [[伊藤博文]]、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1909年]]） * 明治4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[10月15日]]） - [[高野岩三郎]]、[[社会統計学]]者・[[社会運動家]]（+ [[1949年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[開化天皇]]元年（ユリウス暦[[紀元前158年]][[10月14日]]） - [[孝元天皇]]、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1227年]][[10月13日]]） - [[堀川通具]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1171年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[Category:11]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月2日'''（きゅうれきくがつふつか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の2日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[霊亀]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[715年]][[10月2日]]） - 瑞亀献上により[[和銅]]から霊亀に[[改元]] * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月7日]]） - [[比企能員の変]]。[[源頼家]]の外戚・[[比企能員]]による[[北条時政]]打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[10月14日]]） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[10月14日]]） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1641年]][[10月5日]]） - [[吉良義央]]、[[江戸幕府]]高家肝煎（+ [[1702年]]） * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[9月29日]]） - [[真田幸貫]]、第8代[[松代藩]]主（+ [[1852年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[10月10日]]） - [[松平春嶽]]、[[幕末]]の[[越前藩]]主、[[政事総裁職]]（+ [[1890年]]） * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[10月16日]]） - [[伊藤博文]]、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1909年]]） * 明治4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[10月15日]]） - [[高野岩三郎]]、[[社会統計学]]者・[[社会運動家]]（+ [[1949年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[開化天皇]]元年（ユリウス暦[[紀元前158年]][[10月14日]]） - [[孝元天皇]]、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1227年]][[10月13日]]） - [[堀川通具]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1171年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[10月2日]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[10月7日]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[源頼家]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[10月14日]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[10月14日]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[10月5日]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[9月29日]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[10月10日]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[10月16日]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[10月15日]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[10月14日]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[10月13日]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}}
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[10月2日]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[10月7日]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[源頼家]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[10月14日]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[10月14日]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[10月5日]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[9月29日]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[10月10日]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[10月16日]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[10月15日]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[10月14日]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[10月13日]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}}
== See Also ==

== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1171]] ）

[[sn:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[源頼家]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}}

[[sn:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[源頼家]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} qqth year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[歌人]]" to "{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[源頼家]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}

[[sn:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[源頼家]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[天皇]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[Minamoto no Yoriie]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[Emperor of Japan]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021年6月}} == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[Minamoto no Yoriie]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[Emperor of Japan]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1171]] ）

== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[Minamoto no Yoriie]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[Emperor of Japan]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1171]] ）

[[sn:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[Minamoto no Yoriie]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[Emperor of Japan]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021st year 6月}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 2일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 2 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[715]] [[October 2]] ） - 瑞亀献上により{{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} から霊亀に[[改元]] * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1203]] [[October 7]] ） - [[比企能員の変]] 。[[Minamoto no Yoriie]] の外戚・[[比企能員]] による[[北条時政]] 打倒計画が発覚し討たれる * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[October 14]] ） - [[井土ヶ谷事件]] * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 14]] ） - 官吏の給与を年俸制から月給制に改正
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1641]] [[October 5]] ） - [[吉良義央]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 高家肝煎（+ [[1702]] ） * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1791]] [[September 29]] ） - [[真田幸貫]] 、第8代[[松代藩]] 主（+ [[1852]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[October 10]] ） - [[松平春嶽]] 、[[幕末]] の[[越前藩]] 主、[[政事総裁職]] （+ [[1890]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[October 16]] ） - [[伊藤博文]] 、1・5・7・10代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1909]] ） * 明治4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1871]] [[October 15]] ） - [[高野岩三郎]] 、[[社会統計学]] 者・[[社会運動家]] （+ [[1949]] ）
== Deaths == * [[開化天皇]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前158]] [[October 14]] ） - [[孝元天皇]] 、8代[[Emperor of Japan]] * [[嘉禄]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[October 13]] ） - [[堀川通具]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1171]] ）
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021st year 6月}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[715]] {{ill|October 2|ja|10月2日|12=draft}}) – Following the presentation of the "Suikime" (瑞亀献上), the era name was changed from {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kennin|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1203]] {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft}}) – In the incident known as the "Hikii Nōin no Hen" (比企能員の変), the anti-shogunate plot led by the relative of [[Minamoto no Yoriie]] (外戚・比企能員) against {{ill|Hojo Tokimasa|ja|北条時政|12=draft}} was uncovered, and the conspirators were executed. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1863]] {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft}}) – The "Idogataya Incident" (井土ヶ谷事件) occurred. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft}}) – The government reformed official salaries, switching from an annual salary system to a monthly payment system.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1641]] {{ill|October 5|ja|10月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kira Yoshihisa|ja|吉良義央|12=draft}}, lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[1702]]). * [[Kansei]] 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1791]] {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|12=draft}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[1852]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1828]] {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Harugaku|ja|松平春嶽|12=draft}}, lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[1890]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1841]] {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Hirobumi|ja|伊藤博文|12=draft}}, a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[1909]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1871]] {{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Kōya Iwasaburō|ja|高野岩三郎|12=draft}}, a social statistician and social activist (died [[1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[158 BC]] {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|ja|孝元天皇|12=draft}}, the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[Karoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1227]] {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=draft}}, a waka poet (born [[1171]]).
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]]

== Deaths == * [[Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[158 BC]] {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|ja|孝元天皇|12=draft}}, the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[Karoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1227]] {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=draft}}, a waka poet (born [[1171]]).
== Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初二]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 2일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月初二]][[zh:九月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840347]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 2|qq=September 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:715|715]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]]) – Following the presentation of the "Suikime" (瑞亀献上), the era name was changed from [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] to [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]]. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – In the incident known as the "Hikii Nōin no Hen" (比企能員の変), the anti-shogunate plot led by the relative of [[Minamoto no Yoriie]] (外戚・比企能員) against [[:en:Hōjō Tokimasa|Hojo Tokimasa]] was uncovered, and the conspirators were executed. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The "Idogataya Incident" (井土ヶ谷事件) occurred. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The government reformed official salaries, switching from an annual salary system to a monthly payment system.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|qq=|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:715|715]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]]) – Following the presentation of the "Suikime" (瑞亀献上), the era name was changed from [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] to [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]]. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – In the incident known as the "Hikii Nōin no Hen" (比企能員の変), the anti-shogunate plot led by the relative of [[Minamoto no Yoriie]] (外戚・比企能員) against [[:en:Hōjō Tokimasa|Hojo Tokimasa]] was uncovered, and the conspirators were executed. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The "Idogataya Incident" (井土ヶ谷事件) occurred. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The government reformed official salaries, switching from an annual salary system to a monthly payment system.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|qq=|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|qq=|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初二]][[zh:九月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840347]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 2|qq=September 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:715|715]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]]) – Following the presentation of the "Suikime" (瑞亀献上), the era name was changed from [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] to [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]]. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – In the incident known as the "Hikii Nōin no Hen" (比企能員の変), the anti-shogunate plot led by the relative of [[Minamoto no Yoriie]] (外戚・比企能員) against [[:en:Hōjō Tokimasa|Hojo Tokimasa]] was uncovered, and the conspirators were executed. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The "Idogataya Incident" (井土ヶ谷事件) occurred. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The government reformed official salaries, switching from an annual salary system to a monthly payment system.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初二]][[zh:九月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840347]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 2|qq=September 2}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:715|715]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]]) – Following the presentation of the "Suikime" (瑞亀献上), the era name was changed from [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] to [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]]. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – In the incident known as the "Hikii Nōin no Hen" (比企能員の変), the anti-shogunate plot led by the relative of [[Minamoto no Yoriie]] (外戚・比企能員) against [[:en:Hōjō Tokimasa|Hojo Tokimasa]] was uncovered, and the conspirators were executed. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The "Idogataya Incident" (井土ヶ谷事件) occurred. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The government reformed official salaries, switching from an annual salary system to a monthly payment system.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:715|715]] [[:en:October 2|October 2]]) – Following the presentation of the "Suikime" (瑞亀献上), the era name was changed from [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] to [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]]. * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – In the incident known as the "Hikii Nōin no Hen" (比企能員の変), the anti-shogunate plot led by the relative of [[Minamoto no Yoriie]] (外戚・比企能員) against [[:en:Hōjō Tokimasa|Hojo Tokimasa]] was uncovered, and the conspirators were executed. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The "Idogataya Incident" (井土ヶ谷事件) occurred. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – The government reformed official salaries, switching from an annual salary system to a monthly payment system.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1641|1641]] [[:en:October 5|October 5]]) – [[:en:Kira Yoshinaka|Kira Yoshihisa]], lord of the Tokugawa high family (died [[:en:1702|1702]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]]) – {{ill|Sanada Yukinori|ja|真田幸貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanada Yukinori|1=Sanada Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died [[:en:1852|1852]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]) – [[:en:Matsudaira Yoshinaga|Matsudaira Harugaku]], lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died [[:en:1890|1890]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]]) – [[:en:Itō Hirobumi|Itō Hirobumi]], a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died [[:en:1909|1909]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takano Iwasaburo|Kōya Iwasaburō]], a social statistician and social activist (died [[:en:1949|1949]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:158 BC|158 BC]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kōgen|Emperor Kōgen]], the 8th Emperor of Japan. * [[:en:Karoku|Karoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Horikawa Tōkugu|ja|堀川通具|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa Tōkugu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 源通具|1=Minamoto no Michitomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1936219}}, a waka poet (born [[:en:1171|1171]]). == Commemorations == {{Empty section|date=2021|qq=}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|1|9|3|8|2|10|9|0902|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初二]][[zh:九月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初二]][[zh:九月初二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初二]][[zh:九月初二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840347]] Wikidata name: 2nd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 2|qq=September 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki (era)|en|Reiki (era)|WD=Q1373115|lt=Reiki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|715|en|715|WD=Q23528|lt=715}} {{ill|October 2|en|October 2|WD=Q2932|lt=October 2}}) – Following the presentation of the "Suikime" (瑞亀献上), the era name was changed from {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} to {{ill|Reiki (era)|en|Reiki (era)|WD=Q1373115|lt=Reiki}}. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7}}) – In the incident known as the "Hikii Nōin no Hen" (比企能員の変), the anti-shogunate plot led by the relative of [[Minamoto no Yoriie]] (外戚・比企能員) against {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|WD=Q589811|lt=Hojo Tokimasa}} was uncovered, and the conspirators were executed. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}}) – The "Idogataya Incident" (井土ヶ谷事件) occurred. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}}) – The government reformed official salaries, switching from an annual salary system to a monthly payment system.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1641|en|1641|WD=Q6907|lt=1641}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|WD=Q2930|lt=October 5}}) – {{ill|Kira Yoshinaka|en|Kira Yoshinaka|WD=Q3132109|lt=Kira Yoshihisa}}, lord of the Tokugawa high family (died {{ill|1702|en|1702|WD=Q6819|lt=1702}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} Yukitsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729350}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (died {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshinaga|en|Matsudaira Yoshinaga|WD=Q910802|lt=Matsudaira Harugaku}}, lord of the late Edo-period Echizen Domain and a government minister (died {{ill|1890|en|1890|WD=Q7832|lt=1890}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}}) – {{ill|Itō Hirobumi|en|Itō Hirobumi|WD=Q174971|lt=Itō Hirobumi}}, a statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan in the 1st, 5th, 7th, and 10th administrations (died {{ill|1909|en|1909|WD=Q2057|lt=1909}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|October 15|en|October 15|WD=Q2919|lt=October 15}}) – {{ill|Takano Iwasaburo|en|Takano Iwasaburo|WD=Q11673073|lt=Kōya Iwasaburō}}, a social statistician and social activist (died {{ill|1949|en|1949|WD=Q5188|lt=1949}}).

{{Not to be confused with|September 2|qq=September 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki (era)|en|Reiki (era)|WD=Q1373115|lt=Reiki|1=Reiki (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|715|en|715|WD=Q23528|lt=715|1=715}} {{ill|October 2|en|October 2|WD=Q2932|lt=October 2|1=October 2}}) – Following the presentation of the "Suikime" (瑞亀献上), the era name was changed from {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} to {{ill|Reiki (era)|en|Reiki (era)|WD=Q1373115|lt=Reiki|1=Reiki (era)}}. * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin|1=Kennin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203|1=1203}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}) – In the incident known as the "Hikii Nōin no Hen" (比企能員の変), the anti-shogunate plot led by the relative of [[Minamoto no Yoriie]] (外戚・比企能員) against {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|WD=Q589811|lt=Hojo Tokimasa|1=Hōjō Tokimasa}} was uncovered, and the conspirators were executed. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14|1=October 14}}) – The "Idogataya Incident" (井土ヶ谷事件) occurred. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14|1=October 14}}) – The government reformed official salaries, switching from an annual salary system to a monthly payment system.
